'''babuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvigerinid|uvigerinid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvigerinid|uvigerinid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| babuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæbihith|bæbihith]] || [[word:bæbihij|bæbihij]] || [[word:bæbihish|bæbihish]] || [[word:bæbihi|bæbihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:babubuhuth|babubuhuth]] || [[word:babubuhuj|babubuhuj]] || [[word:babubuhush|babubuhush]] || [[word:babubuhu|babubuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:babuhuth|babuhuth]] || [[word:babuhuj|babuhuj]] || [[word:babuhush|babuhush]] || [[word:babuhu|babuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:babufhuth|babufhuth]] || [[word:babufhuj|babufhuj]] || [[word:babufhush|babufhush]] || [[word:babufhuf|babufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:babuhuthu|babuhuthu]] || [[word:babuhuju|babuhuju]] || [[word:babuhushu|babuhushu]] || [[word:babuhuku|babuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:babuhuth|babuhuth]] || [[word:babuhuj|babuhuj]] || [[word:babuhush|babuhush]] || [[word:babuhu|babuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:babuhuthul|babuhuthul]] || [[word:babuhujul|babuhujul]] || [[word:babuhushul|babuhushul]] || [[word:babuhukul|babuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:babuhuthuthu|babuhuthuthu]] || [[word:babuhujuju|babuhujuju]] || [[word:babuhushushu|babuhushushu]] || [[word:babuhuku|babuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:babuhuthun|babuhuthun]] || [[word:babuhujun|babuhujun]] || [[word:babuhushun|babuhushun]] || [[word:babuhukun|babuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:babuhuthuoro|babuhuthuoro]] || [[word:babuhujuoro|babuhujuoro]] || [[word:babuhushuoro|babuhushuoro]] || [[word:babuhukuoro|babuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
